run_summary.summary: Gmail authentication failed this run — the refresh token has expired or been revoked. No emails were scanned and no deals were updated. To fix: re-authorize Brandi's Gmail access and replace the refresh_token in her run configuration. Everything on the board is untouched.

suggestions.message: Brandi's Gmail refresh token has expired. Re-authorize her access at https://oauth2.googleapis.com and update the refresh_token in the run config so she can resume scanning.
